# Name Mismatch Fixture

Tyler Robinson founded Acme in 2023. Tyler has shipped every release since.

Last quarter, Ty led the redesign of the onboarding flow. His team grew from three to eleven.

> "We rebuilt the system from scratch. It was the right call."
> — Ty, Founder

## About the Founder

Robinson is based in Austin. Ty spends half his time with customers and half with engineering.

## Misspelling check

Tyshaun Robison (note misspelling) should be flagged as possible typo if edit distance ≤ 2 from any canonical form.
